financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company made more profit per share even though overall sales went down.
They have steady money coming in and are careful about future predictions due to global issues.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is handling challenges well, but faces pressure from low revenue and tough competition.
Global uncertainties and European market issues are affecting the company's growth, but they are working on big deals to improve.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Average
bullets: The company is doing okay in taking care of social issues like employee welfare and community support.
There is room for improvement in how the company is managed and makes decisions.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company leaders sounded worried about the economy affecting their sales and profits.
They talked a lot about cutting costs and focusing on important goals to handle the tough times.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company often gave general answers without sharing specific details or data.
They talked about big-picture issues but didn't explain how these affect their plans or operations.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Very Poor
bullets: The company is facing challenges in some areas, making it a risky choice for investors right now.
Despite some successes, the uncertain economic situation makes the company's future less predictable.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: Wipro's recent performance shows some struggles with declining revenue, but they are managing costs well.
They have secured many big deals, which could help improve future growth despite current economic challenges.
